---
pagetitle: "Interactive Labs"
title: "Interactive Labs"
subtitle: "33 interactive labs that run entirely in your browser. No install. No setup. Just open and go."
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Stats Row ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stats-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 2rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin: 0.5rem 0 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.stat { text-align: center; }
.stat-num {
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #6366f1;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.stat-lbl {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

/* ── Action Buttons ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.action-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
}
.action-row a {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.5rem 1.2rem;
  border-radius: 7px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.btn-accent {
  background: #6366f1;
  color: white !important;
}
.btn-accent:hover { background: #818cf8; }
.btn-outline {
  border: 1.5px solid #e2e8f0;
  color: #475569 !important;
}
.btn-outline:hover { border-color: #6366f1; color: #fff !important; background: #6366f1; }

/* ── Lab Preview Window ───────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lab-preview-link {
  display: block; text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
  margin: 1.5rem 0 2rem;
  transition: transform 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}
.lab-preview-link:hover {
  transform: translateY(-2px);
  text-decoration: none; color: inherit;
}
.lab-preview-link:hover .lab-window {
  box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(99,102,241,0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(99,102,241,0.3);
}
.lab-window {
  background: #1e293b;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #334155;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}
.lab-window-bar {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  background: #0f172a;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #334155;
}
.lab-window-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; }
.lab-window-dot.red    { background: #ef4444; }
.lab-window-dot.yellow { background: #eab308; }
.lab-window-dot.green  { background: #22c55e; }
.lab-window-tab {
  margin-left: 12px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600;
  color: #94a3b8; letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
}
.lab-window-body { padding: 20px 24px 16px; text-align: left; }

/* ── Three-panel flow ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lab-flow-panels {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr auto 1fr;
  gap: 0; align-items: start;
}
.lab-flow-arrow {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  padding-top: 36px; color: #475569; font-size: 1.1rem;
}
.lp-panel { min-width: 0; }
.lp-panel-label {
  font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.lp-stakeholder {
  background: rgba(0,99,149,0.12);
  border-left: 3px solid #006395;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; padding: 12px 14px;
}
.lp-stakeholder-byline {
  font-size: 0.6rem; font-weight: 700; color: #006395;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.lp-stakeholder-quote {
  font-style: italic; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #cbd5e1; line-height: 1.55;
}
.lp-stakeholder-name {
  font-size: 0.68rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 6px;
}
.lp-prediction-box {
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.08);
  border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.25);
  border-left: 3px solid #6366f1;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; padding: 12px 14px;
}
.lp-prediction-q {
  font-size: 0.78rem; font-weight: 600; color: #c7d2fe;
  line-height: 1.5; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.lp-option {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
  padding: 5px 10px; margin: 4px 0;
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.10);
  border: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.2);
  border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.72rem; color: #a5b4fc; font-weight: 500;
}
.lp-option-radio {
  width: 12px; height: 12px; border-radius: 50%;
  border: 2px solid #6366f1; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.lp-option.selected {
  background: rgba(99,102,241,0.22); border-color: #818cf8;
}
.lp-option.selected .lp-option-radio {
  background: #6366f1; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #1e293b;
}
.lp-lock-warn {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  margin-top: 8px; padding: 6px 10px;
  background: rgba(234,179,8,0.1);
  border: 1px solid rgba(234,179,8,0.2);
  border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.68rem; font-weight: 600; color: #fbbf24;
}
.lp-reveal { position: relative; }
.lp-result-callout {
  background: rgba(0,143,69,0.12);
  border: 1px solid rgba(0,143,69,0.3);
  border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.lp-result-callout .lp-result-icon {
  font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 700; color: #4ade80; margin-bottom: 2px;
}
.lp-result-callout .lp-result-text {
  font-size: 0.7rem; color: #a7f3d0; line-height: 1.45;
}
.lp-chart {
  background: #0f172a; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 12px 8px;
  border: 1px solid #334155;
}
.lp-chart-title {
  font-size: 0.62rem; font-weight: 700; color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; margin-bottom: 8px;
}
.lp-chart-bars { display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 6px; height: 64px; }
.lp-bar-group {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; flex: 1; gap: 3px;
}
.lp-bar { width: 100%; border-radius: 3px 3px 0 0; min-height: 4px; }
.lp-bar-label { font-size: 0.55rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; white-space: nowrap; }
.lp-chart-legend { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-top: 6px; }
.lp-legend-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  font-size: 0.55rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;
}
.lp-legend-swatch { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 2px; }

/* ── HUD bar ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lp-hud {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px;
  padding: 8px 24px; background: #0f172a;
  border-top: 1px solid #334155;
  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; font-size: 0.68rem;
}
.lp-hud-label { color: #64748b; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.06em; }
.lp-hud-value { color: #e2e8f0; }
.lp-hud-sep   { color: #334155; }
.lp-hud-active { color: #4ade80; }

/* ── Install Section ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.install-section {
  background: #0f172a; color: #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px; padding: 1.5rem; margin: 2rem 0 1rem;
}
.install-section h3 { color: white; margin-top: 0; font-size: 1rem; }
.install-section p { font-size: 0.85rem; color: #94a3b8; }
.install-section code {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #93c5fd;
}
.install-section pre {
  background: #1e293b; padding: 1rem; border-radius: 8px;
  margin: 0.75rem 0; overflow-x: auto;
}
.install-section pre code { padding: 0; background: none; }

/* ── Responsive ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (max-width: 900px) {
  .lab-flow-panels { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; }
  .lab-flow-arrow { padding-top: 0; transform: rotate(90deg); font-size: 0.9rem; }
  .lab-window-body { padding: 16px; }
  .lp-hud { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 16px; }
}
</style>

<!-- Lab Preview Window -->
<a href="vol1/lab_01_ml_intro/" class="lab-preview-link" aria-label="Launch Lab 01: The AI Triad">
  <div class="lab-window">
    <div class="lab-window-bar">
      <span class="lab-window-dot red"></span>
      <span class="lab-window-dot yellow"></span>
      <span class="lab-window-dot green"></span>
      <span class="lab-window-tab">Lab 01 &mdash; The AI Triad</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lab-window-body">
      <div class="lab-flow-panels">
        <!-- PANEL 1: Stakeholder Message -->
        <div class="lp-panel">
          <div class="lp-panel-label">Step 1 &middot; Read the Scenario</div>
          <div class="lp-stakeholder">
            <div class="lp-stakeholder-byline">Incoming Message &middot; CTO</div>
            <div class="lp-stakeholder-quote">
              &ldquo;Our model accuracy dropped 8%. The infra team wants 4x more GPUs.
              The data team says training data is 18 months old. Who is right?&rdquo;
            </div>
            <div class="lp-stakeholder-name">&mdash; Dr. Priya Mehta, MedVision Health</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="lab-flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
        <!-- PANEL 2: Prediction Lock -->
        <div class="lp-panel">
          <div class="lp-panel-label">Step 2 &middot; Commit Your Prediction</div>
          <div class="lp-prediction-box">
            <div class="lp-prediction-q">
              The team buys 4x more GPUs.<br/>What happens to accuracy?
            </div>
            <div class="lp-option">
              <span class="lp-option-radio"></span>
              Improves ~4x (proportional)
            </div>
            <div class="lp-option">
              <span class="lp-option-radio"></span>
              Improves modestly (~1.3x)
            </div>
            <div class="lp-option selected">
              <span class="lp-option-radio"></span>
              No change &mdash; bottleneck elsewhere
            </div>
            <div class="lp-lock-warn">
              &#x1F512; Simulator locked until you predict
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="lab-flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
        <!-- PANEL 3: Revealed Chart -->
        <div class="lp-panel lp-reveal">
          <div class="lp-panel-label">Step 3 &middot; See What Actually Happens</div>
          <div class="lp-result-callout">
            <div class="lp-result-icon">&#x2714; Correct</div>
            <div class="lp-result-text">
              The bottleneck is <strong>stale data</strong>, not compute.
              4x GPUs at $120K each = $0 accuracy gain.
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="lp-chart">
            <div class="lp-chart-title">D-A-M Diagnostic &mdash; ResNet-50</div>
            <div class="lp-chart-bars">
              <div class="lp-bar-group">
                <div class="lp-bar" style="height: 44px; background: #ef4444;"></div>
                <div class="lp-bar-label">Data</div>
              </div>
              <div class="lp-bar-group">
                <div class="lp-bar" style="height: 22px; background: #6366f1;"></div>
                <div class="lp-bar-label">Algorithm</div>
              </div>
              <div class="lp-bar-group">
                <div class="lp-bar" style="height: 8px; background: #22c55e;"></div>
                <div class="lp-bar-label">Machine</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="lp-chart-legend">
              <div class="lp-legend-item">
                <span class="lp-legend-swatch" style="background:#ef4444;"></span> Binding
              </div>
              <div class="lp-legend-item">
                <span class="lp-legend-swatch" style="background:#6366f1;"></span> Adequate
              </div>
              <div class="lp-legend-item">
                <span class="lp-legend-swatch" style="background:#22c55e;"></span> Surplus
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="lp-hud">
      <span class="lp-hud-label">LAB</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-value">01 &middot; The AI Triad</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-sep">|</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-label">PARTS</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-value">4 + Synthesis</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-sep">|</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-label">STATUS</span>
      <span class="lp-hud-active">ready</span>
      <span style="margin-left: auto; color: #64748b; font-weight: 600;">Click anywhere to launch &rarr;</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

<!-- Actions -->
<div class="action-row">
  <a href="vol1/lab_01_ml_intro/" class="btn-accent">Launch Lab 01 &rarr;</a>
  <a href="vol1/lab_00_introduction/" class="btn-outline">Start Orientation</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions" class="btn-outline">Share Feedback</a>
</div>

<!-- Stats -->
<div class="stats-row">
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">33</span><span class="stat-lbl">Labs</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">2</span><span class="stat-lbl">Volumes</span></div>
  <div class="stat"><span class="stat-num">~50</span><span class="stat-lbl">Min Each</span></div>
</div>
```

Every lab follows the same three-step structure: read a real-world scenario, commit a prediction before seeing any data, then explore the simulator to discover whether your intuition was right. The prediction lock ensures you can't just passively watch --- you have to think first.

## Run Offline

```{=html}
<div class="install-section">
  <h3>Optional: Run Offline</h3>
  <p>Already running in your browser &mdash; nothing to install. Power users who want offline access or want to hack the simulations can optionally grab the package:</p>
  <pre><code>pip install mlsysim
marimo run lab_01_ml_intro.py</code></pre>
</div>
```

## Part of the MLSysBook Ecosystem

These labs are part of the [Machine Learning Systems](https://mlsysbook.ai) curriculum. They pair with the textbook chapters and use the [mlsysim](https://mlsysbook.ai/mlsysim/) simulation engine for all computations.

- [Share feedback](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/discussions) | [View source](https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book)

:::
